---
title: "Thomas Haase" 
image: media/jupiter.jpg 
toc: false 
about: 
  template: trestles 
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/SamanthaCsik
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/samanthacsik

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
